visual_description:
A close-up shot focuses on a young man with platinum blonde hair peeking from behind a large, dark stone pillar. He wears a dark, high-collared garment. His expression is one of intense concern and urgency as he looks off-camera. The lighting is dim and moody, casting deep shadows. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The audio opens with a tense, low-frequency, and ominous musical score that immediately establishes a feeling of suspense and danger.

The camera pulls back slightly, revealing more of the scene. The young man is now seen with two other young men in what appears to be a dark, dilapidated stone corridor. The man in the center, with dark hair, looks down with a worried expression. The man on the right, also with dark hair, looks on with a similar concerned face. The environment is filled with debris on the floor, suggesting a place of recent chaos or destruction. A male voice cuts through the tension, shouting urgently, "Come on!" His tone is sharp and commanding, filled with a sense of panic and a need for immediate action. The dialogue is followed by a loud, chaotic, and destructive crashing sound, as if heavy objects are being thrown or
